name: mnemoverse-memory
description: Hosted memory for AI agents that learns and forgets — one key across Claude, Cursor & ChatGPT.
long_description: Mnemoverse gives your AI assistant long-term memory that persists across sessions and across tools. Store preferences, decisions, and lessons with memory_write; recall them by natural-language search with memory_read. The same memory is shared everywhere you use your Mnemoverse API key — Claude, Cursor, VS Code, and any MCP client. Requires a free API key from https://console.mnemoverse.com.

tools.name: memory_write
tools.description: Store a memory that should persist across sessions and tools — preferences, decisions, lessons, project facts.

tools.name: memory_read
tools.description: Search your long-term memory by natural-language query before answering or starting a task.

tools.name: memory_feedback
tools.description: Report whether a recalled memory was helpful so good memories surface faster next time.

tools.name: memory_stats
tools.description: Show how many memories are stored, which domains exist, and average quality scores.

tools.name: memory_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete a single memory by its atom_id.

tools.name: memory_delete_domain
tools.description: Permanently delete every memory in a domain (requires an explicit confirm).

api_key.title: Mnemoverse API Key
api_key.description: Mnemoverse API key (starts with mk_live_). Optional — the server installs and lists its tools without it; required only to store or recall memories. Get one free at https://console.mnemoverse.com
